message:
fix: gate sync_dir() behind #[cfg(unix)] for Windows compatibility

Directory fsync via File::open + sync_all is only supported on Unix.
On Windows, opening a directory handle for fsync fails. The sync_dir
call is a durability optimization, not a correctness requirement, so
making it a no-op on non-Unix platforms is safe.

Fixes Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search#69

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
